privileged_info_summary: The task requires using JStock (version 1.0.7.60) to create a new watchlist named "Dividend Stocks". The environment is synthetically initialized via setup scripts that pre-populate the default "My Watchlist" with US stock symbols (AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, NVDA) inside the directory /home/ga/.jstock/1.0.7/UnitedState/watchlist/My Watchlist/ (where "UnitedState" is the verified internal country name). Creating the watchlist through the UI will generate a corresponding new directory at /home/ga/.jstock/1.0.7/UnitedState/watchlist/Dividend Stocks/.
